description: Style Note woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, have come up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Stylish top-stitching on the woodsy upper adds an aesthetic referenced from the outdoors. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt. Product Details Mustard coloured two-tone nubuk upper with aggressive stitch detailing, stitches on the seams of the toe box, two-hole lace up, branding on the toungue, padded insole for in-step comfort, removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic, wooden midsole, dual density TPU outsole with grooves for grip and traction Material and Care Nubuk, TPU Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not store in direct sunlight
